meanings.definition: a kind of pain; something as sudden and painful as being stung
examples: he felt the stinging of nettles

meanings.definition: a painful wound caused by the thrust of an insect's stinger into skin
a swindle in which you cheat at gambling or persuade a person to buy worthless property
cause a sharp or stinging pain or discomfort

examples: A bee stung my arm yesterday

meanings.definition: saddle with something disagreeable or disadvantageous
examples: They stuck me with the dinner bill
I was stung with a huge tax bill

meanings.definition: cause an emotional pain, as if by stinging
